title: centella villosa var. latifolia
intro: Centella villosa var. latifolia, also known as Indian pennywort, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae and is native to tropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centella villosa var. latifolia include improving cognitive function, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, capsules, and topical creams, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
